hero.title: Safwan
hero.subtitle: EEE Student & Developer
hero.description: Electrical & Electronics Engineering student in my final year at Erzincan Binali Yıldırım University. Egyptian, based between Kuwait and Turkey. I build at the intersection of hardware and software — embedded systems, signal processing, 3D graphics, and game development.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The person behind the screen
about.bio_1: I'm a final-year Electrical & Electronics Engineering student at Erzincan Binali Yıldırım University. Originally from Egypt, I split my time between Kuwait and Turkey.
about.bio_2: My work spans embedded systems (Arduino, STM32), signal processing (FFT, filter design), and full-stack development. I'm equally comfortable debugging a circuit and architecting a React app. I believe the best engineers understand both layers.
about.bio_3: Outside coursework, I develop games in Godot 4.7 (my project AstroDodge), build 3D web experiences with Three.js and React Three Fiber, and tinker with IoT and gesture-recognition projects.

astrododge.title: AstroDodge
astrododge.description: A 2D space dodging game built with Godot 4.7. Features procedural obstacle generation, particle effects, and a scoring system. My ongoing game dev project.

sign2speech.title: Sign2Speech
sign2speech.description: Gesture-to-speech recognition system. Converts hand gestures captured via sensors into spoken output. Combines embedded hardware with signal processing for accessible communication.

portfolio.title: 3D Portfolio
portfolio.description: This website — an interactive 3D portfolio with React Three Fiber, cinematic bloom lighting, scroll-driven camera animation, and full i18n support (EN/AR/TR).

dsp-toolkit.title: DSP Toolkit
dsp-toolkit.description: Python toolkit for digital signal processing coursework: FFT analysis, FIR/IIR filter design, spectrogram generation, and real-time audio visualization with Matplotlib.

boost_converter_pwm.title: Boost Converter PWM
boost_converter_pwm.description: Arduino-based PWM control for a boost converter. Includes closed-loop voltage regulation, duty cycle sweep, and real-time monitoring via serial communication.

astrododge-pygame.title: AstroDodge (Pygame)
astrododge-pygame.description: A Python/Pygame port of the AstroDodge space game. Features sprite-based rendering, collision detection, scoring, and difficulty scaling.
